name: Amulet of Health
description: Your Constitution is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect on you if your Constitution is 19 or higher without it.

effect.limitation: No effect if your natural Constitution is already 19 or higher

attunement.description: You must attune to this amulet by wearing it for 1 hour.

activation.description: The magic functions automatically while attuned and wearing the amulet

mechanical_implications.hit_points_increase: Increases HP if Constitution modifier improves
mechanical_implications.constitution_modifier: Becomes +4 if previous score was lower
mechanical_implications.saving_throws: CON saves benefit from higher score

notes: This item is particularly valuable for classes with poor Constitution or those needing maximum HP.
